name: CentyPack GDN Register
query:
SELECT
  g.name AS "GDN:Link/CentyPack GDN:200",
  g.posting_date AS "Posting Date:Date:120",
  g.company AS "Company:Link/Company:160",
  g.docstatus AS "Docstatus:Int:90",
  g.customer AS "Customer:Link/Customer:160",
  g.from_warehouse AS "From WH:Link/Warehouse:160",
  g.to_warehouse AS "To WH:Link/Warehouse:160",
  g.delivery_note AS "Delivery Note:Link/Delivery Note:180",
  g.stock_entry AS "Stock Entry:Link/Stock Entry:180"
FROM `tabCentyPack GDN` g
ORDER BY g.posting_date DESC, g.name DESC
